verses.1: Blessed are all who fear the LORD, who walk in His ways!
verses.2: For when you eat the fruit of your labor, blessings and prosperity will be yours.
verses.3: Your wife will be like a fruitful vine flourishing within your house, your sons like olive shoots sitting around your table.
verses.4: In this way indeed shall blessing come to the man who fears the LORD.
verses.5: May the LORD bless you from Zion, that you may see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life,
verses.6: that you may see your children’s children. Peace be upon Israel!

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
